---
title: "Schedule"
---

:::{.callout-important collapse=false appearance='default' icon=true}
## Developing Schedule
The schedule can be updated. Updates will be marked here and announced on Teams.
:::

# Tabular Schedule  {.unnumbered}

Class is **{{<var day>}}** in 2 consecutive Sessions **{{<var time>}}**      
Location: **{{<var room>}}** in-person if not stated otherwise 

Week | Dates  | What?                  | Where?                  |
-----|--------|------------------------|-------------------------|
1    | Feb 05 | **Kick off the Lab** <br> Watch out for survey link: To collect data for team and topic matching!  | Campus  |
2    | Feb 12 | **Topics and Team Formation**, Q&A | Campus         |
3    | Feb 19 | 🧑‍💻 **Tutorial** (Topic to be announced) | Campus  |
4    | Feb 26 | *Individual meetings with student teams* | Online or Instructor's Office  |
5    | Mar 05 | 1️⃣ **Student Proposal Presentations** [Presentation Guide](presentation.qmd)  | Campus |
6    | Mar 12 | 🧑‍💻 **Tutorial** (Topic to be announced) | Campus    |
7    | Mar 19 | *Individual meetings with student teams*  | Online or Instructor's Office |
8    | Mar 26 | *Individual meetings with student teams*  | Online or Instructor's Office |
     |        |     | Spring break           |        |
9    | Apr 09 | 2️⃣ **Student Progress and Learning Presentations**  [Presentation Guide](presentation.qmd)   | Campus     |
10   | Apr 16 | 🧑‍💻 **Tutorial** Generate Text with AI, Avoid Bullshit  | Campus     |
11   | Apr 23 | *Individual meetings with student teams* <br> | Online or Instructor's Office |
12   | Apr 30 | *Individual meetings with student teams* <br> | Online or Instructor's Office  |  Campus |
13   | May 07 | 3️⃣ **Student Final Presentations ** [Schedule](https://github.com/CU-S25-MSDSSB-DSCI-01-DataScienceLab/Course-Organization-Resources?tab=readme-ov-file#schedule-for-final-presentations-may-15) [Presentation Guide](presentation.qmd)  | Campus |

: {tbl-colwidths="[5, 15, 55, 25]"}

**Deadline** for Project Reports is the regular deadline in the [Academic Calendar]({{<var link.academic-calendar>}}), see the *Deadline for Students to Submit Assessments, Spring Semester*.
